# INTENT

## User Request

Add a frontend-only QR builder section to the project settings page so users can preview, style, color, and download QR codes that point to their project slug.

## Requested Outcome

Users can configure the QR code look, preview it live, and download a version to display, without needing backend QR generation.

## Constraints

- Keep the QR logic frontend-only for now.
- All generated QR codes must point to the project slug URL.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
